modules.name: Input/Output
modules.prompt: Draw two parallelogram shapes vertically: top one labeled 'Input x (B,C,H,W)' at y=20, bottom one labeled 'Output (B,C,H,W)' at y=140. Light gray fill #f5f5f5, stroke #2C3E50. Add a dashed arrow on the right side from top to bottom labeled 'Residual'. Width 200px each, height 50px. Space them 700px apart vertically.

modules.name: Frequency Descriptor
modules.prompt: Draw a horizontal two-path diagram. Left path (blue #dae8fc): 3 boxes stacked vertically: 'GAP' -> 'LayerNorm' -> 'gap_desc'. Right path (orange #fff2cc): 4 boxes stacked: 'Multi-scale HP (s=1,2,4)' -> 'Scale Router' -> 'HP Gate (σ)' -> 'gated_hp'. Connect with downward arrows within each path. Add a merge box at bottom: 'Concat → desc (B,2C)'. Total width 350px, height 250px. Academic style, Arial font, stroke #2C3E50.

modules.name: Expert Routing
modules.prompt: Draw 3 boxes vertically stacked with arrows between them: 1) 'MLP Scoring (Linear→ReLU→Linear)' blue fill #dae8fc, 2) 'Prompt Experts (K=16)' with a small grid icon, light purple #e8d5f5, 3) 'Softmax(τ) → Σ(prob_k × kernel_k)' green fill #d5e8d4. Width 300px each, height 50px, gap 30px. Stroke #2C3E50, Arial 11pt.

modules.name: Conv and Attention
modules.prompt: Draw 3 boxes horizontally or vertically: 1) 'Dynamic Conv 3×3' medium blue #b4d7f5, 2) 'GELU' small gray box, 3) 'Channel Attention (SE)' light gray #e8e8e8. Connect with downward arrows. Width 250px, height 50px each, gap 20px. Stroke #2C3E50.
